description: Docker Compose stack: PostgreSQL+pgvector, Neo4j, Redis, FastAPI, React dev server
steps: Verify infra/docker-compose.yml defines services postgres (with pgvector image), neo4j, redis, api, and web. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Run docker compose config to validate the file. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Run docker compose up -d for postgres, neo4j, redis and confirm all three report healthy. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Verify no credentials are hardcoded; all secrets come from environment variables referenced in .env.example. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.

description: FastAPI backend skeleton with app factory, settings from env, and /health endpoint
steps: Verify apis/ contains a FastAPI app package with pyproject.toml or requirements.txt pinning fastapi, uvicorn, langgraph, redis, psycopg, neo4j. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Verify settings are loaded from environment variables (pydantic-settings) with no hardcoded URLs or keys. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Start the app and GET /health returns 200 with per-dependency status (postgres, neo4j, redis). Expected result: the endpoint returns the documented status code and JSON shape.

description: React intake dashboard scaffold (Vite + TypeScript) with dev/build/lint/type-check scripts
steps: Verify apps/dashboard/package.json declares scripts dev, build, lint, type-check and engines.node >= 20. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Run npm run build in apps/dashboard with zero type errors. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Run npm run dev and confirm HTTP 200 on the base route. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.

description: PostgreSQL migration SQL creating all operational tables from the schema
steps: Verify migration files create intake_records, extracted_fields, gap_list, caregivers, service_areas, insurance_contracts, referral_sources, call_records, follow_up_events, audit_trail, icd10_codes, zip_codes, medication_dosage_ranges. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Verify intake_records has JSONB columns for patient, clinical, insurance and an is_synthetic boolean NOT NULL. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Apply migrations against a fresh database and confirm all tables exist. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.

description: Neo4j Cypher seed scripts for the 13-node/14-relationship knowledge graph
steps: Verify Cypher seeds create the 13 node types (Patient, Diagnosis, Payer, InsurancePlan, CoverageRule, ServiceType, CertificationType, Caregiver, ServiceArea, Physician, ReferralSource, Medication, Document). Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.

Verify the 14 relationship types are created including REQUIRES, NEEDS_CERTIFICATION, HAS_CERTIFICATION, SERVES_AREA, COVERS. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Run the seed script against Neo4j and query counts per label to confirm data loaded from data/reference JSON files. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.

description: Redis key conventions and connection module for pipeline/call/eligibility/retry state
steps: Verify a shared Redis module defines key builders pipeline:{doc_id}, call:{call_sid}, eligibility_cache:{zip}:{payer}:{plan}, retry_queue. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Verify eligibility cache entries are written with a short TTL. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Unit test round-trips a value through each key type. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.

description: .env.example documenting every required environment variable
steps: Verify .env.example lists DATABASE_URL, NEO4J_URI, NEO4J_USER, NEO4J_PASSWORD, REDIS_URL, TWILIO_ACCOUNT_SID, TWILIO_AUTH_TOKEN, TWILIO_PHONE_NUMBER, GEMINI_API_KEY, PUBLIC_BASE_URL (ngrok). Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Verify no real secret values appear in .env.example and no .env file is committed. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.

description: Reference data present and loadable: ICD-10 subset, diagnosis-service-cert mapping, payer rules
steps: Verify data/reference contains icd10_top30_home_health.json, diagnosis_service_certification_mapping.json, payer_coverage_rules.json (5 payers, 8 plans). Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Verify a loader parses each file into typed structures without error. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Verify every diagnosis in the mapping references an ICD-10 code present in the subset. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.

description: Synthetic seed data: caregiver roster (20-30), referral sources, sample referral PDFs
steps: Verify data/synthetic contains a caregiver roster JSON with 20-30 caregivers including type, certifications with expiry, zips, availability, languages, load, capacity, status. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Verify 3-4 sample referral PDFs of varying quality exist for pipeline testing. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Verify every synthetic record is tagged is_synthetic: true when loaded into PostgreSQL. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.

description: Backend test harness with pytest and CI-runnable safety suite entry point
steps: Verify pytest is configured and a tests/ package exists in apis/. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Verify tests/test_safety_layer.py exists and is wired so the suite fails the build if any safety test fails. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Run pytest and confirm the suite executes. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.

description: Safety guarantee 1: fake data only — is_synthetic enforced on every DB write
steps: Verify the DB write layer hard-asserts is_synthetic is true and raises on any record missing or false. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Verify the app refuses to boot unless DATABASE_URL matches an allowlisted demo database name. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.

Test in test_safety_layer.py: writing a non-synthetic record raises; booting against a non-allowlisted DB name aborts. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.

description: Safety guarantee 2: tokenize -> LLM -> rehydrate wrapper; single LLM entry point
steps: Verify exactly one function in the codebase calls the Gemini API and all agents route through it. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.

Verify identifiers (name, DOB, phone, address, member ID) are replaced with placeholders like {{PATIENT_NAME}} before the payload is built. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.

Verify the wrapper regex-scans its outgoing payload for identifier patterns (phone formats, DOB dates, member ID formats) and refuses to send on match. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Verify rehydration replaces placeholders only inside the backend after the LLM responds. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Verify a grep/static check confirms no other module imports the LLM SDK directly. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Verify token maps are stored per-request in backend memory or Redis, never sent to the LLM. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Verify DOB, address, and member ID patterns are each covered by the outgoing regex scan. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Verify the wrapper logs a redacted audit event when it blocks a payload. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.

Verify vision-path document images are handled per the same policy (identifier fields tokenized in accompanying text prompts). Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.

Test in test_safety_layer.py: payload containing a raw phone number is rejected; tokenized round-trip restores original values. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.

description: Safety guarantee 3: check_eligibility() is deterministic code, never LLM-decided
steps: Verify check_eligibility() contains no LLM calls and evaluates zip match, insurance acceptance, and caregiver availability from tables/graph only. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.

Verify the response-generation function requires a pre-computed EligibilityResult object as a mandatory input parameter. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.

Test in test_safety_layer.py: clear-yes case returns ACCEPT, clear-no returns DECLINE, ambiguous returns NEEDS_MORE_INFO. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.

description: Safety guarantee 4: consent gather is the first node of every call flow
steps: Verify the consent node is the only node wired to the incoming-call trigger in the call flow graph. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.

Verify every data-collection function reads consent_given from the persisted call record and refuses to run when false. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Verify a 'no' answer routes to human transfer or graceful end with zero data collection. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Test in test_safety_layer.py: data collection without consent raises; consent 'no' produces the handoff path. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.

description: Safety guarantee 5: banned-phrase filter via SafeResponse type before TTS
steps: Verify speak()/TTS output only accepts a SafeResponse typed object that filters banned phrases ('guarantee', 'promise', 'definitely will', '100%', 'for sure', 'confirmed appointment at') on construction. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Verify there is no code path that sends text to TTS without constructing SafeResponse. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Test in test_safety_layer.py: an over-promising draft never reaches output verbatim. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.

description: Safety guarantee 6: no silent call drop — every failure degrades to human handoff
steps: Verify every call turn is wrapped in a try/except boundary routing exceptions, timeouts, and clarification_attempts threshold breaches to the handoff path. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Verify the handoff path speaks a fallback message and logs the handoff (transfer or scheduled callback). Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Test in test_safety_layer.py: force-raise mid-turn asserts a spoken response plus a logged handoff. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.

description: CI safety suite test_safety_layer.py covers all 6 guarantees and gates the build
steps: Verify test_safety_layer.py contains at least one assertion per guarantee (1-6). Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Run the suite and confirm all safety tests pass. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Verify a CI script or make target runs the safety suite and exits non-zero on failure. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.

description: EligibilityResult model: ACCEPT / DECLINE / NEEDS_MORE_INFO with reasons list
steps: Verify a typed EligibilityResult carries exactly one status of ACCEPT, DECLINE, NEEDS_MORE_INFO plus structured reasons. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Unit test constructs each status and serializes to JSON. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.

description: Service area check against agency zip list
steps: Verify a served zip returns pass and an unserved zip returns a hard fail with reason 'zip not served'. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Verify missing zip yields NEEDS_MORE_INFO, not DECLINE. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Unit tests cover served, unserved, and missing zip. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.

description: Insurance check against payer/plan contracts
steps: Verify accepted payer+plan passes; unaccepted payer hard-fails with reason. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Verify unknown or fuzzy plan names route through pgvector/pg_trgm fuzzy match before failing. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Verify missing insurance info yields NEEDS_MORE_INFO. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Unit tests cover accepted, rejected, fuzzy-matched, and missing cases. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.

description: Clinical matching: diagnosis -> service type -> certification via Neo4j traversal
steps: Verify the Cypher traversal Diagnosis-REQUIRES->ServiceType-NEEDS_CERTIFICATION->CertType<-HAS_CERTIFICATION-Caregiver-SERVES_AREA->ServiceArea returns matching caregivers. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Verify expired certifications are excluded via the HAS_CERTIFICATION expiry property. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Unit test with seeded graph: known diagnosis+zip returns the expected caregiver set. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.

description: Caregiver availability filter: capacity, status, schedule
steps: Verify caregivers at max capacity or with status other than active are excluded from matches. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Unit tests cover at-capacity, on-leave, and available caregivers. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.

description: Coverage rules: insurance plan COVERS service type, prior auth requirements
steps: Verify InsurancePlan-COVERS->ServiceType is cross-checked and uncovered services fail with reason. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Verify REQUIRES_AUTH surfaces 'prior authorization required' in the result's documentation needs. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Unit tests cover covered, uncovered, and auth-required plans using payer_coverage_rules.json. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.

description: Decision engine bias: DECLINE only on black-and-white facts, else NEEDS_MORE_INFO
steps: Verify DECLINE fires only when zip or insurance fails unambiguously. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.

Verify any ambiguity (no caregiver match, missing fields, fuzzy insurance) yields NEEDS_MORE_INFO with specific missing items. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Unit tests assert an ambiguous case never returns DECLINE. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.

description: Eligibility result caching in Redis keyed by zip:payer:plan with short TTL
steps: Verify a repeated check hits the cache (no second Neo4j query) within the TTL. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Verify cache expiry triggers a fresh traversal. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Unit test with fake Redis asserts cache hit and miss behavior. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.

description: Only the Eligibility Agent writes eligibility/acceptance decisions
steps: Verify the intake status transitions to eligible/accepted/declined only through the Eligibility Agent's write path. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Unit test: attempts to set an acceptance status from voice or pipeline modules are rejected. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.

description: Eligibility check performance suitable for mid-call loop (2-3 seconds)
steps: Measure check_eligibility() end-to-end against local databases and confirm it completes within 3 seconds. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Verify the voice layer emits filler speech when the loop exceeds the threshold. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.

description: Layer 1 — Ingestion and preprocessing: PDF/TIFF standardization and page cleanup
steps: Verify uploads of PDF and TIFF are standardized to per-page images/text with deskew/denoise/contrast steps applied. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Verify each page is tagged scanned-image vs digital-text. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Unit test with a sample PDF asserts page count and per-page type detection. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.

description: Layer 2 — Page classification into document types
steps: Verify each page is classified as one of: physician order, face-to-face note, discharge summary, medication list, insurance card, lab results, consent form, fax cover sheet. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Verify fax cover sheets are marked junk and excluded from extraction. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Test with a sample packet asserts expected classifications per page. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.

description: Layer 3 Path B — rule-based extraction for digital-text PDFs (Docling + regex)
steps: Verify Docling parses text layers and regex/keyword rules extract patient name (after 'Patient:'/'Name:'), ICD codes (letter+digits), member IDs by payer format, NPI (10 digits). Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Unit tests feed known text snippets and assert extracted fields. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.

description: Layer 3 Path C — Gemini vision extraction for image pages
steps: Verify image pages route to the Gemini Flash vision extractor through the single tokenizing LLM wrapper. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Verify extraction returns fields with per-field values from the image. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Test with a scanned sample page asserts non-empty structured output (mockable in CI). Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.

description: Layer 4 — Both paths converge into standardized raw JSON per page
steps: Verify rules-path and vision-path outputs normalize to the same schema including extraction_path (rules/vision) per field. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Unit test asserts schema equality of both paths' outputs. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.

description: Layer 5 — Validation Agent: ICD-10, NPI Luhn+NPPES, member ID format, dates, zip, dosage ranges
steps: Verify ICD-10 codes are validated against the reference table. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Verify NPI passes Luhn check and (when online) NPPES registry lookup. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.

Verify member ID matches the payer-specific format, DOB is reasonable, discharge date is after admission date, zip exists. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Verify medication dosage is checked against medication_dosage_ranges (e.g. Metformin 50000mg flagged as OCR error). Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Verify an invalid ICD-10 code produces a validation failure record naming the field and rule. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Verify an NPI failing the Luhn check is flagged even when NPPES is unreachable. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Verify DOB in the future or older than 120 years is rejected as unreasonable. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Verify discharge date earlier than admission date is flagged. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Verify a nonexistent zip code is flagged against the zip_codes reference table. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Unit tests cover a passing record and one failure per validator. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.

description: Layer 5 — Correction Agent: reasons about validation failures with confidence tiers
steps: Verify 'M17.1I' is auto-corrected to 'M17.11' with high confidence. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Verify a medium-confidence correction (e.g. 'H12O456789' O->0) is applied but flagged for review. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.

Verify an uncorrectable value (e.g. 'Lisinopril 200mg') is flagged for human review and added to the gap list for voice verification. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Unit tests assert all three confidence outcomes. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.

description: Layer 5 — Cross-Reference Agent: consistency across pages
steps: Verify mismatched patient name/DOB across documents is flagged. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Verify diagnosis text vs ICD code mismatch is flagged. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.

Verify medication-diagnosis inconsistency (Warfarin without anticoagulation indication) is flagged for clinical review. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Unit tests cover each cross-reference rule. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.

description: Layer 6 — Completeness check against the requirements checklist with gap generation
steps: Verify the checklist covers demographics, signed physician orders, face-to-face documentation, insurance info, diagnosis+ICD, homebound status, medication list. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Verify each missing item becomes a specific gap_list row with a follow-up task for the Voice Agent. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Test with an incomplete packet asserts the expected gaps. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.

description: Layer 7 — Confidence scoring and routing (HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW)
steps: Verify HIGH (rules+validated+cross-confirmed) auto-populates the intake record. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Verify MEDIUM (vision+validated, single doc) auto-populates and flags for review. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Verify LOW (failed validation/uncertain correction) is withheld and added to the gap list. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Unit tests assert routing per tier. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.

description: Pipeline state tracked in Redis per document across layers
steps: Verify pipeline:{doc_id} records current layer, extracted-so-far, and validation status as the document progresses. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Test asserts state transitions through all 7 layers. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.

description: End-to-end pipeline run on sample referral PDFs with seeded OCR errors
steps: Run POST /process-document with each sample PDF from data/synthetic. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Verify all 7 layers execute and structured JSON with confidence scores and gap list is returned. Expected result: the endpoint returns the documented status code and JSON shape.
Verify the seeded OCR error (e.g. 'M17.1I') is corrected with the right confidence. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Verify extracted fields land in extracted_fields with source document and page traceability. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Verify an intake_records row is created with status reflecting completeness. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.

description: Twilio ConversationRelay WebSocket handler at /twilio/conversation-relay
steps: Verify the WebSocket endpoint accepts ConversationRelay setup, prompt, and interrupt message types. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Verify TwiML/voice webhook configuration connects the Twilio number to the WebSocket URL (PUBLIC_BASE_URL). Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Integration test with a simulated ConversationRelay client completes a message round-trip. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.

description: Consent gather node: AI + recording disclosure, yes/no branch, persisted flag
steps: Verify the first spoken message discloses AI handling and recording and asks for consent. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Verify 'yes' persists consent_given=true on the call record before any data question. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Verify 'no' routes to transfer/graceful end with zero data collection. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Test both branches via the simulated call harness. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.

description: Caller type detection routing to Provider / Family / Patient modes (WORKFLOW Path A Step 3)
steps: Verify detection runs only after consent_given=true, so no classification or data collection precedes consent. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Verify early-turn classification assigns provider, family, or patient mode from caller statements. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.

Verify the mode selects the corresponding static system prompt (Layer 1 control) and is persisted as call.mode in Redis. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.

Verify a caller who self-identifies ('I'm the discharge planner', 'I'm his daughter', 'I need care for myself') maps to the correct mode. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.

Verify inbound is never routed to Outbound mode — Outbound is reserved for agency-initiated calls carrying a mission parameter. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Tests assert each mode is selected from representative utterances for provider, family, and patient. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.

description: Caller type detection: ambiguous or low-confidence classification handling (WORKFLOW Path A Step 3)
steps: Verify an ambiguous opening (caller type unclear) triggers one neutral clarifying question rather than guessing a mode. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Verify classification confidence is recorded on the call record and low confidence keeps the safe default mode. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Verify the default mode when still unresolved is the most cautious (Family/plain-language, never-promise) profile. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.

Verify repeated failure to resolve caller type increments clarification_attempts and can reach the human handoff path (guarantee 6). Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Test asserts an ambiguous utterance yields a clarifying question and the cautious default, not a random mode. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.

description: Mid-call mode switch when caller type becomes clearer (WORKFLOW Path A Step 3)
steps: Verify a later turn revealing the true caller type re-assigns call.mode and swaps to the corresponding system prompt. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Verify a mode switch preserves already-collected structured fields in call state (no data loss on switch). Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Verify each mode transition is logged with old_mode, new_mode, and the triggering turn for dashboard visibility. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Verify a switch never bypasses the 4 safety gates on subsequent turns. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Test asserts a family->provider switch mid-call keeps prior fields and applies the new prompt. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.

description: Provider mode: clinical, structured intake with real-time eligibility mid-call
steps: Verify provider mode collects name, DOB, diagnosis, insurance, zip in a structured flow. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.

Verify extracted data flows to the orchestrator -> Eligibility Agent mid-call and the result shapes the next utterance (Layer 2 dynamic control). Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Verify an ACCEPT with missing F2F note produces the specific document ask. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Verify a DECLINE result is communicated honestly and immediately during the call. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Verify a NEEDS_MORE_INFO result asks for the specific missing fields. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Verify the eligibility loop uses only tokenized structured fields (zip, payer, service type). Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Verify every provider-mode utterance passed the banned-phrase filter before TTS. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Verify collected fields accumulate in the call state across turns. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Simulated call test reaches a real-time ACCEPT/DECLINE/NEEDS_MORE_INFO before hangup. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.

description: Family mode: compassionate plain language, never promises coverage
steps: Verify family-mode prompt uses plain language, no jargon, and captures partial information gracefully. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.

Verify responses never promise coverage or availability (banned-phrase filter plus prompt constraints) and always schedule a coordinator follow-up. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Simulated midnight family call ends with intake status NEW, human flag by 9 AM, and SMS confirmation queued. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.

description: Patient mode: slower pace, explains physician order requirement
steps: Verify patient mode explains the physician order requirement for skilled care and offers to coordinate with their doctor. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Verify contact info is captured for follow-up. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Simulated self-referral call test asserts the explanation and captured contact. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.

description: Outbound mode: single-mission calls (collect document, verify detail, schedule visit)
steps: Verify outbound calls carry exactly one mission parameter and open with the same consent gather. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Verify outbound calls pass through the identical safety-gated flow (tokenize, filter, handoff). Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Test asserts an outbound document-request call collects the answer and updates the gap. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.

description: Real-time structured extraction from caller speech into the call state
steps: Verify each caller turn updates call:{call_sid} in Redis with collected fields and remaining questions. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Verify only structured, tokenized fields (zip, payer, service type) are sent to eligibility — never names. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Test asserts incremental field accumulation across turns. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.

description: 4-gate safety flow on every conversation turn
steps: Verify the turn pipeline order: extract -> tokenize -> deterministic eligibility (parallel) -> LLM draft -> rehydrate -> banned-phrase filter -> TTS. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Verify no code path skips a gate. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Integration test traces one turn and asserts all gates executed in order. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.

description: Filler speech when the eligibility loop exceeds 2-3 seconds
steps: Verify a timer emits natural filler speech ('Let me check our availability for that area... one moment') when the loop is slow. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Test with an artificially delayed eligibility call asserts filler is spoken. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.

description: Clarification attempts counter with threshold-triggered human handoff
steps: Verify clarification_attempts increments in call state on misunderstood turns. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Verify crossing the threshold routes to the handoff path with spoken fallback. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Test asserts the handoff after N failed clarifications. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.

description: Call transcript capture and consent flag persisted per call
steps: Verify call_records stores call_sid, mode, consent_given, full transcript, timestamps. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Verify the transcript is retrievable via GET /intakes/:id/transcript. Expected result: the endpoint returns the documented status code and JSON shape.

description: LangGraph orchestrator state machine: received -> processed -> decided lifecycle
steps: Verify a LangGraph graph models referral received -> document processing -> eligibility -> decision -> follow-up. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.

Verify the orchestrator never calls Twilio, never parses documents, and never queries databases directly — only routes to sub-agents. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Unit test drives a referral through the full state sequence. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.

description: Orchestrator routing between pipeline, eligibility, and voice actions
steps: Verify a completed document run routes extracted data to the Eligibility Agent. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Verify NEEDS_MORE_INFO results trigger follow-up tasks (outbound call/SMS) for each gap. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Test asserts routing decisions per eligibility outcome. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.

description: Merge logic: document + voice data into one unified intake record
steps: Verify fields from a fax and a subsequent call about the same patient merge into one intake record without duplicates. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Verify higher-confidence values win on conflict and conflicts are flagged. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Unit test merges overlapping document and voice data and asserts the resolved record. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.

description: Intake record status lifecycle with timestamps for every event
steps: Verify statuses new, processing, pending_documents, eligible, accepted, declined transition correctly with validation of legal transitions. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.

Verify timestamps recorded for received, extraction complete, eligibility checked, first call made, patient admitted. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Unit tests cover a legal path and an illegal transition rejection. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.

description: Audit trail: every decision logged with the data that informed it
steps: Verify every eligibility decision writes an audit_trail row containing inputs (zip, payer, diagnosis, caregiver matches) and the outcome. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Verify no PHI appears in application logs (tokenized values only). Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Test asserts an audit row per decision and log scan finds no identifier patterns. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.

description: ACID protection against double-accepting a patient
steps: Verify accepting an intake uses a transaction/row lock so two concurrent accepts cannot both succeed. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Concurrency test fires two simultaneous accepts and asserts exactly one wins. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.

description: Follow-up Agent: SMS confirmations via Twilio Programmable SMS
steps: Verify POST /follow-up/sms sends a confirmation SMS with referral ID through Twilio (mockable client). Expected result: the endpoint returns the documented status code and JSON shape.
Verify the send is logged in follow_up_events with result. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.

description: Document request links via SMS/email
steps: Verify gap follow-ups can include a document upload link in SMS/email. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Verify the link resolves to the upload endpoint feeding the document pipeline. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.

description: Retry logic: voicemail -> 2h retry, silent SMS -> next morning, 3 failures -> human escalation
steps: Verify a voicemail result schedules a retry in 2 hours via the Redis retry_queue. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Verify an unanswered SMS schedules a next-morning follow-up. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Verify the third failed contact attempt escalates to a human coordinator and stops automated retries. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Unit tests cover each retry rule and the escalation cutoff. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.

description: Outbound call trigger re-enters the safety-gated flow
steps: Verify POST /follow-up/outbound-call initiates a Twilio outbound call whose flow starts at the consent node. Expected result: the endpoint returns the documented status code and JSON shape.
Verify there is no separate unguarded outbound path in the codebase. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.

description: Callback scheduling with POST /follow-up/schedule
steps: Verify scheduling persists to follow_up_events and enqueues in retry_queue with the target time. Expected result: the endpoint returns the documented status code and JSON shape.
Verify the scheduler worker picks up due items and executes the action. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.

description: Scheduler worker service processing the Redis retry queue
steps: Verify a services/ worker polls retry_queue and dispatches due follow-ups (call, SMS, escalation). Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Verify Twilio rate limits are respected via the Redis rate-limit keys. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Test with a fake clock asserts due items are dispatched exactly once. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.

description: GET /health with per-dependency status
steps: GET /health returns 200 with status for postgres, neo4j, redis. Expected result: the endpoint returns the documented status code and JSON shape.
Verify a downed dependency is reported degraded without crashing the endpoint. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.

description: POST /eligibility-check returns status with reasons
steps: POST with zip/payer/plan/diagnosis returns ACCEPT, DECLINE, or NEEDS_MORE_INFO plus reasons and documentation needs. Expected result: the endpoint returns the documented status code and JSON shape.
Verify request validation rejects malformed payloads with 422. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Integration tests cover each of the three outcomes. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.

description: POST /process-document runs the 7-layer pipeline
steps: POST a PDF and receive structured JSON with extracted fields, confidence scores, and gap list. Expected result: the endpoint returns the documented status code and JSON shape.
Verify processing is tracked in Redis and results persisted to PostgreSQL. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.

description: GET /intakes lists referrals with status for the dashboard
steps: GET /intakes returns all referrals with status, timestamps, and urgency. Expected result: the endpoint returns the documented status code and JSON shape.
Verify filtering by status works. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.

description: GET /intakes/:id returns the full intake record
steps: Response includes extracted fields with confidence, gaps, transcript references, and referral source. Expected result: the endpoint returns the documented status code and JSON shape.
Verify 404 for unknown id. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.

description: GET /intakes/:id/gaps returns the gap list with follow-up status
steps: Response lists each missing item, actions taken, attempts, and current status. Expected result: the endpoint returns the documented status code and JSON shape.

description: GET /intakes/:id/transcript returns call transcripts
steps: Response includes per-call transcript, mode, and consent status. Expected result: the endpoint returns the documented status code and JSON shape.

description: GET /analytics/referral-sources: volume, acceptance rate, response times
steps: Response aggregates referral count, acceptance rate, and average response time per source. Expected result: the endpoint returns the documented status code and JSON shape.
Integration test with seeded data asserts the computed metrics. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.

description: GET /analytics/time-to-decision speed metrics
steps: Response returns time-to-decision distribution/averages computed from event timestamps. Expected result: the endpoint returns the documented status code and JSON shape.

description: GET /caregivers/matches/:intake_id with selection/rejection reasons
steps: Response lists considered caregivers and why each was selected or ruled out (cert, area, capacity, expiry). Expected result: the endpoint returns the documented status code and JSON shape.

description: Twilio webhook signature validation on inbound HTTP webhooks
steps: Verify inbound Twilio webhooks validate the X-Twilio-Signature header and reject invalid signatures with 403. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Test with a forged signature asserts rejection. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.

description: Consistent error envelope and no-PHI error messages across the API
steps: Verify errors return a consistent JSON envelope without stack traces or identifiers. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Test asserts a triggered error contains no patient identifiers. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.

description: Returning caller recognition from referral source phone number
steps: Verify an inbound call from a known referral-source number loads their history before the greeting. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Verify the greeting acknowledges the caller ('Hi Sarah, calling from Mount Sinai?') using tokenized-safe rendering. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Test with a seeded referral source asserts the personalized greeting path. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.

description: Referral source history: count, acceptance rate, preferred communication method
steps: Verify referral_sources stores and updates history per interaction. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Verify the Voice Agent receives history as context for returning callers. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.

description: Cross-interaction context: prior family call informs today's follow-up
steps: Verify a follow-up call about an existing intake loads the prior transcript summary and collected fields. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Test: create an intake via a simulated family call, then start a follow-up and assert the context is present. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.

description: Clinical guardrail: never gives medical advice
steps: Verify prompts instruct refusal of medical advice with redirection to the physician/coordinator. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Test: a medical-advice question in a simulated call yields a refusal + redirect, never advice. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.

description: Operational guardrail: no admission promise before eligibility confirms; human named as final confirmer
steps: Verify accept-style language is only generated when an EligibilityResult of ACCEPT is present. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Verify responses name a human coordinator as the final confirmer. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Test asserts a pre-eligibility turn contains no admission confirmation. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.

description: Escalation on low confidence or complexity
steps: Verify low-confidence extractions and complex scenarios flag the intake for the human needs-review queue. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Test asserts a LOW-confidence field produces a review flag. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.

description: Field-level traceability: every extracted field maps to source document and page
steps: Verify extracted_fields rows carry source document id, page number, and extraction path. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Test asserts traceability for every field extracted from a sample PDF. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.

description: Pipeline board: referrals by status with timestamps and urgency badges
steps: Verify columns/sections for new, processing, pending documents, eligible, accepted, declined. Expected result: the UI renders the described element without console errors.
Verify each card shows patient reference, timestamps, and an urgency badge. Expected result: the UI renders the described element without console errors.
Component test renders seeded intakes into the correct columns. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.

description: Referral detail view with confidence color coding (green/yellow/red)
steps: Verify extracted fields render with green (high), yellow (medium), red (low) confidence indicators. Expected result: the UI renders the described element without console errors.
Verify each field shows source document and page traceability. Expected result: the UI renders the described element without console errors.
Component test asserts color mapping per confidence tier. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.

description: Gap list panel with per-gap action history
steps: Verify each gap shows the missing item, actions taken (SMS sent, call attempted), attempts, and status. Expected result: the UI renders the described element without console errors.
Component test renders a gap with two actions and asserts the history order. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.

description: Transcript panel: full transcripts, consent status, caller mode
steps: Verify transcripts render per call with consent status badge and mode label (provider/family/patient/outbound). Expected result: the UI renders the described element without console errors.
Component test asserts consent and mode display. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.

description: Caregiver match panel with selection/rejection reasons
steps: Verify considered caregivers list shows why each was selected or ruled out. Expected result: the UI renders the described element without console errors.
Component test renders match data from GET /caregivers/matches/:intake_id. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.

description: Analytics view: referral source volume, acceptance rates, time-to-decision
steps: Verify charts/tables render referral-source analytics and time-to-decision metrics from the analytics endpoints. Expected result: the UI renders the described element without console errors.
Component test asserts rendering with seeded metric data. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.

description: Needs-review queue for flagged medium/low confidence fields and escalations
steps: Verify flagged fields and escalations appear in a dedicated queue for the human coordinator. Expected result: the UI renders the described element without console errors.
Component test asserts a flagged field appears in the queue. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.

description: Live/refreshing pipeline status so demo updates are visible
steps: Verify the dashboard reflects backend status changes (polling or websocket) without a manual full reload. Expected result: the UI renders the described element without console errors.
Test: change an intake status via API and assert the board updates. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.

description: Document upload UI feeding POST /process-document for the fax demo
steps: Verify a PDF can be uploaded from the dashboard and the pipeline progress (7 layers) is visible. Expected result: the UI renders the described element without console errors.
Test: upload a sample PDF and assert layer progress renders. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.

description: Consistent design system: colors, typography, spacing tokens
steps: Verify a central token set (Tailwind config or CSS variables) drives colors/spacing; no ad-hoc hex values scattered in components. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Visual pass confirms consistent look across all panels. Expected result: the UI renders the described element without console errors.

description: Status and confidence color semantics consistent across the app
steps: Verify the same green/yellow/red semantics are used everywhere confidence appears, and status colors are consistent between board and detail view. Expected result: the UI renders the described element without console errors.

description: Responsive layout: dashboard usable on laptop and projector resolutions
steps: Verify the board and detail views render without overflow at 1280x800 and 1920x1080. Expected result: the UI renders the described element without console errors.

description: Loading, empty, and error states for every data panel
steps: Verify each panel shows a loading indicator, a friendly empty state, and a non-technical error state. Expected result: the UI renders the described element without console errors.
Component tests assert all three states per panel. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.

description: Accessible components: labels, contrast, keyboard navigation on interactive elements
steps: Verify interactive elements have accessible names and visible focus, and confidence colors meet contrast plus a non-color cue (icon/text). Expected result: the UI renders the described element without console errors.

description: Urgency badges visually distinct (routine / urgent / 24-hour start of care)
steps: Verify the three urgency levels render distinct badges on the pipeline board. Expected result: the UI renders the described element without console errors.

description: NPPES NPI Registry live validation with offline fallback
steps: Verify NPI validation calls the free NPPES API and interprets found/not-found. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Verify a network failure degrades to Luhn-only validation with a MEDIUM confidence flag, never a crash. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Test with mocked API covers found, not found, and timeout. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.

description: RxNorm medication normalization via RxNav API
steps: Verify medication names normalize through RxNav with fuzzy local fallback for variants. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Test with mocked API asserts normalization of a known variant. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.

description: pgvector/pg_trgm fuzzy matching for insurance plans, medications, physician names
steps: Verify fuzzy lookup resolves near-miss names ('Untied Healthcare' -> 'UnitedHealthcare') above a similarity threshold. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Unit tests cover a hit, a below-threshold miss, and an exact match. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.

description: Twilio number + ConversationRelay + ngrok wiring documented and scriptable
steps: Verify infra contains a setup script/README section wiring the Twilio number's voice webhook to PUBLIC_BASE_URL. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Verify starting the tunnel and updating the webhook is a single documented command sequence. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.

description: E2E flow 1: discharge planner call from hello to done
steps: Start the stack and open a simulated ConversationRelay session in PROVIDER mode. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Verify the consent disclosure is the first utterance and 'yes' is logged. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Provide referral details (name, DOB, diagnosis, insurance, zip) across turns. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Verify mid-call eligibility runs and returns ACCEPT with a missing F2F note. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Verify the spoken response passes the banned-phrase filter and asks for the F2F documentation specifically. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
End the call and verify an intake record exists with status PENDING_DOCUMENTS. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Verify an SMS confirmation with the referral ID was sent (mock Twilio). Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Verify a gap follow-up is scheduled in 4 hours in the retry queue. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Verify the full transcript and consent flag are persisted. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Verify audit_trail contains the eligibility decision with its inputs. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Verify the dashboard shows the new referral in the pending-documents column. Expected result: the UI renders the described element without console errors.

description: E2E flow 2: fax referral arrives and triggers follow-ups
steps: POST a sample referral PDF to /process-document. Expected result: the endpoint returns the documented status code and JSON shape.
Verify the document advances through all 7 pipeline layers with Redis state visible per layer. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.

Verify extraction output includes confidence scores and the expected gap list (missing F2F note, low-confidence member ID). Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Verify the orchestrator routes the result to the Eligibility Agent and receives ACCEPT-with-gaps. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Verify an outbound provider call task is created to verify the member ID and request the F2F note. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Verify an outbound patient/family call task is created to confirm address and schedule the first visit. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Verify an SMS/email with a document upload link is queued. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Verify both outbound calls are configured to start at the consent node (safety-gated). Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.

Verify the intake record, extracted fields, gaps, and audit trail are all persisted and visible in the dashboard detail view. Expected result: the UI renders the described element without console errors.
Verify time-to-decision timestamps were recorded at each stage. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.

description: E2E flow 3: family member calls at midnight
spec_reference: workflows/flow Family member calls at midnight
steps: Open a simulated call classified into FAMILY mode. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Verify a compassionate greeting plus consent gather occurs first. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Provide partial information (no clinical details) and verify the agent accepts incompleteness gracefully. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Verify a preliminary eligibility check runs on zip and general insurance type. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.

Verify the response sets expectations without a firm commitment and asks to prepare the insurance card and doctor contact. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Verify banned phrases never appear in any response of the session. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
End the call and verify the intake record has status NEW and is flagged for a human coordinator by 9 AM. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Verify the SMS confirmation was queued. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Verify the transcript shows mode=family and consent=true. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Verify the dashboard needs-review queue shows the coordinator flag. Expected result: the UI renders the described element without console errors.

description: E2E flow 4: wrong zip / unaccepted insurance -> fast honest DECLINE
steps: Simulate a provider call with an unserved zip code. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Verify the eligibility result is DECLINE with the specific reason. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Verify the spoken decline is honest and fast so the referral source can place the patient elsewhere. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Verify the intake record is marked declined with the reason in the audit trail. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.

description: E2E flow 5: outbound follow-up call collects a missing document commitment
steps: Given an intake with a gap, trigger POST /follow-up/outbound-call. Expected result: the endpoint returns the documented status code and JSON shape.
Verify the outbound call opens with consent and states its single mission. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Simulate the provider agreeing to send the document; verify the gap status updates and the retry is cancelled. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Verify the interaction is transcribed and audited. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.

description: E2E flow 6: agent error mid-call degrades to spoken fallback + human handoff
steps: Force an exception during a simulated call turn. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Verify the caller hears the fallback ('Let me connect you with a coordinator') — never silence. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Verify a handoff (transfer or scheduled callback) is logged and visible in the dashboard. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.

description: Concurrent calls and parallel fax processing without state bleed
steps: Run two simulated calls concurrently and verify call:{call_sid} states never mix fields. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Process two PDFs in parallel and verify pipeline:{doc_id} states remain independent. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.

description: Garbled OCR fields are never auto-populated; verified by phone instead
steps: Process a PDF with an uncorrectable garbled field and verify it is withheld from the intake record. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Verify a gap entry with a voice-verification task is created for that field. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.

description: Demo compliance checklist verification script
steps: Verify a script/make target runs test_safety_layer.py plus smoke checks (health, eligibility, one PDF, one simulated call) before any demo. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Run it and confirm all checks pass with a summarized report. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.

description: Backend code coverage >= 80% on core modules
steps: Run pytest with coverage over eligibility, pipeline, voice, orchestrator, follow-up, and safety modules. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Verify total coverage is at least 80% and the report is generated. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.

description: Frontend test coverage on dashboard components
steps: Run the frontend test suite (vitest/RTL) covering board, detail, gaps, transcript, matches, analytics, review queue components. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Verify coverage of the components package is at least 80%. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.

description: One-command local bring-up via init.sh
steps: Run ./init.sh on a clean checkout and verify databases start, migrations/seeds apply, backend and frontend start. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
Verify the script prints the URLs for API, dashboard, and Neo4j browser plus next steps for ngrok/Twilio. Expected result: the command/check completes successfully with no blocking errors.
